title.cn: 从文字到价值：基于 LLM 的新生文章影响力预测
title.eng: From Words to Worth: Newborn Article Impact Prediction with LLM

authors.cn: Penghai Zhao, Qinghua Xing, Kairan Dou, Jinyu Tian, Ying Tai, Jian Yang, Ming-Ming Cheng, Xiang Li
authors.eng: Penghai Zhao, Qinghua Xing, Kairan Dou, Jinyu Tian, Ying Tai, Jian Yang, Ming-Ming Cheng, Xiang Li

summary.cn: 随着学术文献数量持续增长，如何仅依据标题与摘要快速识别出具有潜在高影响力的新生文章，成为一个重要问题。这项工作利用微调 LLM 直接从标题和摘要中挖掘语义特征，对文章的未来影响力进行预测，并构建了对应数据集与评估体系。实验结果表明，该方法在新生文章影响力预测任务上达到了先进水平。
summary.eng: As the academic landscape expands, the challenge of efficiently identifying potentially high-impact articles among the vast number of newly published works becomes critical. This paper introduces a promising approach, leveraging fine-tuned LLMs to predict the future impact of newborn articles solely from titles and abstracts. It builds a dedicated dataset and evaluation pipeline, and demonstrates state-of-the-art performance on this impact prediction task.

title.cn: PAMI 领域综述的综述：模式分析与机器智能中文献综述的文献研究
title.eng: A Literature Review of Literature Reviews in Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence

authors.cn: Penghai Zhao, Xin Zhang, Ming-Ming Cheng, Jian Yang, Xiang Li
authors.eng: Penghai Zhao, Xin Zhang, Ming-Ming Cheng, Jian Yang, Xiang Li

summary.cn: 这项工作聚焦于 Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence 领域的综述性文章，对大量综述进行系统性梳理、统计分析与指标设计。文中基于 RiPAMI 数据库分析综述文献的参考文献质量、学术影响等特征，并讨论 AI 生成综述在前沿研究识别方面的局限。
summary.eng: This work examines literature reviews in the Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence field. Based on the RiPAMI database, it analyzes authoring patterns, bibliometric properties, and the relationship between reference quality and academic impact. The paper also discusses limitations of AI-generated reviews in identifying cutting-edge research.

title.cn: 乌金体藏文文档版面分析与识别系统
title.eng: Uchen Document Layout Analysis and Recognition System

venue.cn: 硕士论文 / 系统项目

summary.cn: 该工作面向藏文古籍文档的二值化、版面分析与字符识别任务，综合传统方法与深度学习方案，完成了一个稳定、可扩展的工程系统。系统覆盖打印文档与历史文档场景，并将 PyQT5、OpenCV 与 PyTorch 组合到实际应用中。
summary.eng: This work studies binarization, layout analysis, and recognition for Tibetan documents, covering both contemporary and historical materials. It combines traditional methods with deep learning approaches and delivers a practical engineering system built with PyQT5, OpenCV, and PyTorch.

title.cn: 基于 Attention U-Net 的历史藏文文档图像二值化伪粘连缓解方法
title.eng: Alleviating pseudo-touching in attention U-Net-based binarization approach for the historical Tibetan document images

authors.cn: P Zhao, W Wang, G Zhang, Y Lu
authors.eng: P Zhao, W Wang, G Zhang, Y Lu

summary.cn: 历史藏文文档图像在二值化过程中很容易出现伪粘连笔画，从而影响后续的分割与识别。该工作围绕 Attention U-Net 建模，提出了输入/输出重缩放等实用技巧，有效缓解伪粘连问题，并在多种降质场景下取得了更精细的二值化效果。
summary.eng: Binarization remains challenging for degraded historical Tibetan document images because pseudo-touching strokes can harm downstream segmentation and recognition. This work introduces practical techniques around attention U-Net, including input/output rescaling, to alleviate pseudo-touching and improve robustness under illumination changes, stains, and noise.

title.cn: 基于实例分割的历史藏文文档细粒度版面分析
title.eng: Accurate fine-grained layout analysis for the historical Tibetan document based on the instance segmentation

authors.cn: P Zhao, W Wang, Z Cai, G Zhang, Y Lu
authors.eng: P Zhao, W Wang, Z Cai, G Zhang, Y Lu

summary.cn: 该研究聚焦于历史藏文文档中的细粒度版面分析问题，尝试直接对子行级别结构进行实例分割。工作通过针对 SOLOv2 进行适配与数据构建优化，在古籍文档的版面解析任务上获得了具有竞争力的结果。
summary.eng: This work targets fine-grained layout analysis in historical Tibetan documents through instance segmentation. By adapting SOLOv2 and improving dataset construction, it enables sub-line level structure recognition and delivers competitive results for complex historical layouts.
